title: Update actions/labeler action to v6.2.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [actions/labeler](https://redirect.github.com/actions/labeler) | action | minor | `v6.1.0` → `v6.2.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>actions/labeler (actions/labeler)</summary>

### [`v6.2.0`](https://redirect.github.com/actions/labeler/releases/tag/v6.2.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/actions/labeler/compare/v6.1.0...v6.2.0)

#### What's Changed

##### Bug Fix

- Improve PR number validation and warning messages in input handling by [@​chiranjib-swain](https://redirect.github.com/chiranjib-swain) in [#​939](https://redirect.github.com/actions/labeler/pull/939)

##### Dependency Updates

- Bump js-yaml to 4.2.0, apply npm audit fix, and add undici override  by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [#​943](https://redirect.github.com/actions/labeler/pull/943)
- Bump [@​typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin](https://redirect.github.com/typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin) from 8.59.1 to 8.61.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [#​942](https://redirect.github.com/actions/labeler/pull/942)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/actions/labeler/compare/v6.1.0...v6.2.0>

</details>

---
